game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: Bloons TD 6 Bloons TD 6 is a tower defense game where players strategically place and upgrade monkey towers along a path to pop waves of incoming "Bloons" (balloons) before they reach the end. The game features diverse Bloon types requiring specific tower abilities, an in-game cash economy for tower purchases and upgrades, and a "Monkey Knowledge" meta-progression system providing permanent buffs.
game_info.description: Monkey Defense is a tower defense game where you strategically place monkey towers to pop balloons before they reach the exit. Each popped balloon gives you money to buy and upgrade more towers. Place your towers wisely, manage your economy, and survive all 15 waves to win the game!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move tower placement cursor
Space: Place selected tower at cursor position
Z: Cycle through available tower types
Shift: Upgrade selected tower (when cursor is over an existing tower)
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart game when game is over
game_info.automated_testing:
<TEST_1>
<test_description>Tests basic game functionality by randomly placing towers and upgrading them to ensure the game runs without errors.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Places towers at random positions along the path and occasionally upgrades existing towers using sticky key actions.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Game runs without errors for at least 300 frames, showing towers popping balloons and earning money.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_1>
<TEST_2>
<test_description>Tests if the game can be won by strategically placing and upgrading towers to defeat all waves.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Places towers at optimal positions near path curves and upgrades them at strategic times to maximize popping power.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Player successfully defeats all 15 waves and reaches the GAME_OVER_WIN state.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_2>
<TEST_3>
<test_description>Tests the tower selection and upgrade mechanics to ensure they function properly.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Cycles through all tower types, places each type, and attempts to upgrade them to verify all tower functionality.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>All tower types can be selected, placed, and upgraded without errors, showing their different attack patterns.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_3>
<TEST_4>
<test_description>Tests the game's economy system by focusing on money generation and efficient spending.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Prioritizes placing income-generating banana farms early and uses minimal defenses until later waves.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Player accumulates a large amount of money (500+) while still defending against balloons effectively.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_4>
<TEST_5>
<test_description>Tests the game's difficulty progression by observing if later waves are more challenging than earlier ones.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Places a fixed set of towers and observes how they perform against increasingly difficult waves.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Later waves (10+) show more balloons with higher health reaching further into the path than early waves with the same defense.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_5>
